6. total_budget: Present but only as a statement 'See side-by-side comparison table for detailed breakdown...' without an actual complete cost breakdown. This does not fully meet the requirement for a 'complete cost breakdown'.

So, 5 out of 6 items are fully specified according to the requirements.
